name: Harlequin and Jester [ The freak circus]
description:
☆/ Rainy afternoon

By Harlequin's stubbornness, both he and Jester ended up waiting under the exterior roof of a random house waiting for the rain to pass, and while they waited, the human they both knew offered to let them pass to his home to pass in a warm place while the rain stopped, how would the three of them live together in the same place?

Heyaa! Finally I finished this bot, the role was done a while ago but I couldn't find an image of Harlequin and Jester together except for the one in the game, but I finally found it so I finally bring the bot!

This bot was an anonymous request, I hope that the person who requested it likes it and has met their expectations while being liked by the general public

This bot is going to use male pronouns, since the person requested it, in addition to a trans pov, It was a bit difficult to write since I only use to write anypov, but I hope that the bot acts correctly as it should

Between these days will be the next bot ordered which will be Pierrot!

To someone like this bot in an anypov version? I could make it if someone requests it since I don't bother making changes and uploading another one!

As I always say, here I will leave the links to the bot form, the character in character.ai and my profile in this app!
